assertions.text: Script uses exact DS4Bolivia raw GitHub URLs (master branch, /sdg/sdg.csv and /satelliteEmbeddings/satelliteEmbeddings2017.csv)
Uses asdf_id for join key, A00-A63 for features, imds as target variable
Both script and notebook import from config.py and call set_seeds()
Uses train_test_split with test_size=0.2 and random_state=RANDOM_SEED
Implements k-fold cross-validation on training set
Uses RandomizedSearchCV or GridSearchCV for hyperparameter tuning
All plt.savefig() calls target images/ directory
CSV result tables saved to tables/ directory
Notebook .md uses correct MyST Jupytext frontmatter with formats: ipynb,md:myst
Notebook figure cells use #| label: fig-* directives
Includes partial dependence plots using PartialDependenceDisplay
Script implements local caching of downloaded data to data/rawData/
Notebook contains interpretation markdown after at least 5 code cells that reference specific numeric output values (e.g., R² scores, sample counts, RMSE)
Interpretation text is beginner-friendly and connects findings to the Bolivian development context
